overview: A high-end, real-time cryptocurrency market-cap tracker built on the ICP blockchain. Shows the top 100 coins with live EUR prices, multi-timeframe performance (1h / 24h / 7d), interactive sparklines and a one-tap coin profile — styled as a German-language trading terminal that beats CoinMarketCap and CoinGecko on density and speed.
features: Top 100 cryptocurrencies ranked by market cap, refreshed every 30 seconds
Live EUR prices fetched via ICP HTTP outcalls with 60-second server-side cache
Global stats bar: total market cap, 24h volume, BTC and ETH dominance, active coins
Top Movers strips for gainers and losers, per chosen timeframe
Three timeframes selectable (1h / 24h / 7d) that switch table column, top movers and sort
7-day sparkline charts with gradient fill, color-coded by 7d direction
Persistent client-side watchlist with star toggle and 'Watchlist' tab
Quick-filter tabs: Alle, Watchlist, Top Gewinner, Top Verlierer
Coin detail drawer with large chart, 1h/24h/7d performance, ATH distance, volume, supply, 24h high/low
Subtle price-flash highlight on live tick changes (green up, red down)
Search with Cmd/Ctrl+K shortcut, Esc-to-clear and German collation
Sortable table: rank, price, change %, volume, market cap
Sticky column header below site header for scrolling comfort
German number formatting throughout (1.234,56 €, Mio / Mrd / Bio)
Mobile-first responsive layout: progressive column hiding, card-friendly rows
Stale-data fallback: canister serves last good snapshot if upstream API fails
Skeleton loading states across global stats, top movers and the main table
Error state with retry and informative empty states for search and watchlist
